sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_fuzzing (id UInt32, value1 Int32, value2 Int32, str_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, intDivOrZero(value1, value2) AS div_result FROM test_fuzzing WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value1 - intDivOrZero(value2, 5) as result FROM test_fuzzing WHERE str_value = 'test1';
SELECT id, intDivOrZero(value1, (SELECT MIN(value2) FROM test_fuzzing WHERE value2 < 0)) AS safe_div FROM test_fuzzing;
SELECT id, intDivOrZero(value1, value2 - 1) AS adjusted_div FROM test_fuzzing GROUP BY value1 HAVING adjusted_div > 0;
SELECT id, value1 - intDivOrZero((CASE WHEN str_value = 'test1' THEN 0 ELSE value2 END), 0) AS adjusted_value FROM test_fuzzing;
SELECT t.id, intDivOrZero(t.value1 + t.value2, (SELECT SUM(value2) FROM test_fuzzing WHERE id < t.id)) AS conditional_div FROM test_fuzzing t;
SELECT id, intDivOrZero(nullIf(value1, 10), CASE WHEN value2 = 0 THEN 1 ELSE value2 END) AS null_safe_div FROM test_fuzzing;
CREATE TABLE temp_fuzzing AS SELECT id, value1, value2 FROM test_fuzzing WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_fuzzing SELECT id, intDivOrZero(value1, value2) AS computed_value1, intDivOrZero(value2, -1) AS computed_value2 FROM test_fuzzing;
SELECT id, computed_value1 - computed_value2 AS final_adjustment FROM temp_fuzzing WHERE computed_value1 IS NOT NULL;
